entry.title: Introduction to Myblog
entry.content:
Hi people,

This is an introduction to both my blog and myself.

Actually, I’m not the guy who has been really passionate about these things before. However, ever since I made the decision to take the postgraduate entrance exam and aim to be admitted to Nanjing University, everything has changed for me.

I’m determined to do whatever it takes to reach my goal, even if it seems impossible. I believe that I can achieve it because I make my own luck.

I’ve already enabled the comments module, so if there are any mistakes or questions, please feel free to let me know. It will be awesome to make progress with all of you.

Best regards,

Xian
04/22/2023
